title: Better Gauntlets （更好的拳套）
description:
引入了拥有 3D 手部模型、强力蓄力机制及专属魔咒的阶级拳套系统，重新定义你的打击感！更好的鞘翅操控，优于烟花。
Adds tiered gauntlets with 3D hand models, powerful charging mechanics, and unique enchantments. Redefine your combat!
Better Elytra handling, superior to fireworks.
body:
🥊 Better Gauntlets (更好的拳套)
Better Gauntlets is a combat-focused mod for Fabric 1.21.1 that introduces a new way to fight. Move beyond swords and axes—embrace the power of your fists with a fully realized tiered gauntlet system.

Better Gauntlets 是一款专为 Fabric 1.21.11 设计的战斗增强模组。它为游戏引入了一套全新的近战武器——拳套。相比于传统的长剑和斧头，拳套更强调单次攻击的爆发力、精准的控制以及极致的打击回馈。
✨ Features | 核心特性
Tiered System: Includes Leather, Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite gauntlets.
等级系统：包含皮革、铜、铁、金、钻石及下界合金六个等级的拳套。

3D Visuals: Every gauntlet features a high-quality 3D hand model for an immersive first-person experience.
3D 视觉：每个拳套都拥有高质量的 3D 手部模型，提供沉浸式的第一人称战斗体验。

Heavy Impact: Features custom sound effects for charged punches, giving every hit a satisfying weight.
沉重打击：为蓄力攻击配备了专属音效，让每一拳都充满力量感。

Polished Textures: The Copper Gauntlet is clean and bright, free from oxidation/rust for a premium metallic look. 
精致纹理：铜拳套采用了抛光质感，没有生锈痕迹，展现出高级的金属光泽。
🔥 Combat Mechanics | 战斗机制
Unlike standard weapons, gauntlets use a Charge System:
                
Charge: Hold Right-Click to gather power.
Release: Unleash a devastating punch that deals massive single-target damage and strong knockback.
拳套拥有独特的长按蓄力机制：
蓄力：按住右键进行力量汇聚。
释放：挥出重拳，对单体目标造成巨额伤害并附带强力击退。
⚡ Custom Enchantments | 专属附魔
Gauntlets support standard enchantments like Sharpness, but also feature two unique upgrades:

Shockwave (震荡波):
Creates a powerful area-of-effect blast around the target upon impact.
震荡波：在命中目标处产生范围伤害。

Void Hook (虚空钩锁):
Pulls distant enemies towards you on impact, perfect for catching Skeletons.
虚空钩锁：将远处的敌人强行拉向玩家。
📦 Requirements | 安装要求
Minecraft: 1.21.11
Loader: Fabric
Dependency: Fabric API

📜 Latest Update Log | 最新更新日志 (v1.0.1)
Added Recipe Unlock System: Players can now see all gauntlet recipes in the crafting book after picking up the base materials.

Fixed Diamond Gauntlet Recipe: Corrected material tags to ensure it can be crafted properly with vanilla diamonds.

Improved Mod Stability: Removed invalid dummy recipes that caused log errors.

Version bump to 1.0.1.

新增配方解锁系统：玩家在捡起基础材料后，即可在工作台配方书中直接查阅并一键合成。

修复钻石拳套配方：修正了材料标签，确保使用原版钻石可以正常合成。

优化模组稳定性：删除了会导致后台报错的无效配方。

版本号更新至 1.0.1。
